item.title: 修复（插件）：增强插件 API 兼容性诊断消息…
item.summary: fix(plugins): enhance plugin API compatibility diagnostic messages with troubleshooting guidance (#94019) * fix(plugins): enhance plugin API compatibility diagnostic messages with troubleshooting guidance Improve the diagnostic messages in shouldSkipIncompatiblePackagePluginApi to include actionable troubleshooting hints when plugin discovery is skipped due to version mismatches or invalid metadata. Related to #93908 Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com> * fix(plugins): align compatibility diagnostics Extend the discovery guidance to the manifest-registry load path and assert the exact remediation text.\n\nCo-authored-by: 杨爱文 <yang.aiwen@xydigit.com> --------- Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com> Co-authored-by: Peter Steinberger <steipete@gmail.com>
